title: inputs
description: Inputs used to select or evaluate a controller. Mirrors the MAS / CAS / RAS / CONAS inputs structure: a required designRequirements seed plus optional operatingPoints (the converter operating conditions under which the controller's own bias loss / junction temperature are evaluated). outputs[i] aligns positionally with operatingPoints[i].

operatingPoint.description: One converter operating condition relevant to the controller's own dissipation and thermal state.

supplyVoltage.description: Bias-rail (VCC) voltage at this point, in volts.

switchingFrequency.description: Switching frequency at this point, in Hz.

loadFraction.description: Converter load as a fraction of full load (0..1), for light-load / standby points.
